title: Fix long C++ compilation due to VerilatedScope constructors

features.name: vpi_scope_triggers_compilation_complexity
features.description: Code should include VPI-related scope usage that triggers creation of many VerilatedScope instances in the Syms class during compilation, leading to extended C++ compile times when --vpi is used

features.name: scope_name_display_format_in_system_task
features.description: Code should include system tasks with %m format specifier that reference hierarchical scope names, which interact with VerilatedScope during AstScopeName emission and contribute to compilation complexity when VPI is enabled

extraction_summary.notes: Issue is a PR about internal C++ compilation performance optimization. No original SV code snippets provided. Features extracted based on VPI context and scope-related constructs mentioned in PR description. The root cause is non-trivial VerilatedScope constructors in Syms class when --vpi is used.
